(M0150) Unknown Payment Source Current payment sources for home care: unknown. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x
M0150_CPY_WRKCOMP (M0150) Workers Compensation Current payment sources for home care: worker's compensation. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x x x x
M0160_LTD_FIN_FOOD (M0160) Limited Financial Factors - Food Financial factors limiting ability of patient/family to meet basic health needs: unable to afford food. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x
